title: Add Team (dynamic) filter to boards/views
excerpt:
Hi, 
it could be very useful to allow a filter by the Person column to be dynamic also for a team. 
Thus, If I have a filter set to Team (dynamic) then I can see in my table all the items assigned to my team.

posts.author: apintus (Antonio Pintus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
it could be very useful to allow a filter by the Person column to be dynamic also for a team.

posts.author: juan.pyco (Juan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear monday team. This has been siting here for quite a while and doesn´t seem to be getting any attention.

I’d argue it is probably an easy win and a much needed feature.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml: I would LOVE this feature!!! It would solve a few problems I am having!
